mapper.select: SELECT emp_no AS empNo, name AS empName, status, LTRIM(RTRIM(password)) AS password, role, locked, login_fail_count AS failCount FROM dbo.employee_52 WHERE emp_no = #{empNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE dbo.employee_52 SET password = #{encodedPassword}, login_fail_count = 0, locked = 0 WHERE emp_no = #{empNo}
mapper.select: SELECT emp_no AS empNo, name AS empName, dept_id AS deptId, status, login_fail_count AS failCount, locked FROM dbo.employee_52 ORDER BY emp_no ASC

SELECT e.emp_no AS empNo, e.dept_id AS deptId, d.name AS deptName, e.name, e.status, e.position, e.role, e.job, e.email, e.phone, e.hire_date AS hireDate, e.position_level AS positionLevel FROM dbo.employee_52 e LEFT JOIN dbo.department_52 d ON e.dept_id = d.id

SELECT emp_no AS empNo, name AS name, dept_id AS deptId, status AS status, locked AS locked, role AS role, email AS email, phone AS phone, position_level AS positionLevel, job AS job, hire_date AS hireDate, resign_date AS resignDate, position AS position FROM dbo.employee_52 WHERE emp_no = #{empNo}
